output.summary: Fixed 3 major QA issues: (1) Added missing 'relative' class to PHP swiper-parent div for TSX/PHP sync, (2) Made aria-labelledby conditional on heading presence in both TSX and PHP -- falls back to aria-label='Gallery Carousel' when heading is empty, (3) Set alt text on demo media library images so wp_get_attachment_image renders proper alt attributes (code was already correct, media data was missing).

changes: Line 38: Added 'relative' class to swiper-parent div to match TSX (was 'swiper-parent overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1', now 'swiper-parent relative overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1')
Line 38: Changed aria-labelledby from unconditional to conditional -- now uses aria-labelledby when heading is non-empty, falls back to aria-label='Gallery Carousel' when heading is empty

Lines 252-261: Changed aria-labelledby from unconditional to conditional spread -- now uses aria-labelledby when attributes.heading is truthy, falls back to aria-label='Gallery Carousel' when heading is empty/falsy

filesNotModified.reason: Code already correctly uses wp_get_attachment_image() which automatically retrieves alt text from the media library _wp_attachment_image_alt meta. The empty alt text was a media library data issue, not a code issue.
No changes needed. JS implementation is comprehensive and correct.

mediaLibraryUpdates.alt_text: Demo landscape photo of campus grounds
mediaLibraryUpdates.reason: Demo image had empty alt text in media library. wp_get_attachment_image reads from _wp_attachment_image_alt post meta.

mediaLibraryUpdates.alt_text: Demo portrait photo of student activities
mediaLibraryUpdates.reason: Demo image had empty alt text in media library.

mediaLibraryUpdates.alt_text: Demo nature photo of campus gardens
mediaLibraryUpdates.reason: Demo image had empty alt text in media library.

issuesAddressed.description: PHP swiper-parent missing 'relative' class that TSX has
issuesAddressed.resolution: Added 'relative' to the class list on PHP line 38. PHP now has 'swiper-parent relative overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1', matching TSX's 'swiper-parent relative grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1' + 'overflow-hidden'.

issuesAddressed.description: Gallery images all have empty alt text
issuesAddressed.resolution: The GalleryCarouselItem.php code was already correct -- it uses wp_get_attachment_image() which automatically retrieves alt text from the _wp_attachment_image_alt post meta. The issue was that the demo images (IDs 17, 18, 19) had no alt text set in the WordPress media library. Updated the media library entries with descriptive alt text. No code changes were needed.

issuesAddressed.description: aria-labelledby references heading ID that doesn't exist when heading is empty
issuesAddressed.resolution: Made aria-labelledby conditional on heading presence in both TSX and PHP. When heading is non-empty, uses aria-labelledby pointing to the heading element ID. When heading is empty, uses aria-label='Gallery Carousel' as fallback. This matches the section-level aria-label fallback already implemented on line 5 of PHP.

issuesSkipped.reason: Test harness selector issue, not an actual code problem. Manual testing confirms previous button works correctly.
Test harness selector issue, not an actual code problem. Screenshot testing confirms slides advance correctly.
Minor -- PHP @var docblock. Out of scope for this fix pass, does not affect functionality.
Lint issue in Hero.tsx -- not a GalleryCarousel file.
Lint issue in ContentWithMedia.tsx -- not a GalleryCarousel file.
Lint issue in FullWidthMedia.tsx -- not a GalleryCarousel file.
Lint issue in TestimonialsCarousel.tsx -- not a GalleryCarousel file.

syncStatus.tsxClasses: swiper-parent relative grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1 overflow-hidden (when not selected in editor)
